DP.348.0000:
...Pant...pant...\f
...Why am I running like this
anyway?!\f
That new universe that the boss
was talking about...\f
It’s giving me goose bumps thinking
about it... So, we use this...\f
DP.348.0001:
Gweh! You were eavesdropping!
I was only talking to myself!\f
You’re persistent, too...
I’m pooped out from all the running...\f
But, I’m not...
Going to battle you...\f
DP.348.0002:
Aww, no...
You’re still on my tail...?\r
The lake’s within sight...\f
You leave me no choice...
My Pokémon will KO you...\f
DP.348.0003:
I can’t battle anymore...
I’m running on fumes...\f
I’ll have to give this to the
Commander...\f
I wish...
I got to use it at the lake...\f
DP.348.0004:
Cynthia: Oh, hello, long time no see!
How is your Pokédex filling up?\f
I came to research the folklore
about the lake, but...\f
Well, it doesn’t appear as if the
lake is open to the public now.\f
Have you heard the folklore about it?\f
They say there is an island inside
the lake.\f
And inside that island is a mirage
of a Pokémon.\f
No one must enter the chamber
of that Pokémon...\f
Sorry to change the subject, but
have you seen the group of PSYDUCK\r
on Route 210?
DP.348.0005:
Cynthia: Yes, that’s right.
By the cafe on Route 210.\f
You’ve seen that group of PSYDUCK
huddled with their heads in their,\r
uh, hands...?\f
DP.348.0006:
Cynthia: You haven’t seen them?
By the cafe on Route 210.\f
There’s a group of PSYDUCK huddled
with their heads in their, uh,\r
hands...?\f
DP.348.0007:
Anyway, what you should do is use
this medicine on the PSYDUCK.\f
You’re working on a Pokédex, so it
would be worthwhile for you.\f
DP.348.0008:
Cynthia: I went on a big adventure
with a Pokédex when I was younger.\f
I hope you get to meet every kind
of Pokémon there is to see.\f
It may help you with the secret of
the mirage Pokémon.\f
See you later!\f
DP.348.0009:
We’ve been asked to keep everyone
out of the lake area.\f
Reason? I’m not too sure, but
apparently to protect the lake.
DP.348.0010:
To protect the lake...\f
It’s nice to know there are still
people worth admiring like that.\f
I believe his name was Cyrus?
DP.348.0011:
Stop, stop!
Yes, you!\f
Sunyshore City, which is down this
road, had a major blackout!\f
Crews are working on restoring
power, but the road’s closed now.\f
DP.348.0012:
Stop, stop!
Yes, you!\f
Sunyshore City, which is down this
road, had a major blackout!\f
Crews are working on restoring
power, but the road’s closed now.
DP.348.0013:
What am I to do...?\f
I’ve gone and dropped my Suite
Key somewhere again...\f
The hotel people won’t be happy with
me...\f
I’m sure I had it when I left the
reception counter earlier...
DP.348.0014:
What am I to do...?\f
I’ve gone and dropped my Suite
Key somewhere again...\f
Oh!
That’s my Suite Key!\f
You found it for me?
Oh, that’s sweet of you! Thank you!\f
DP.348.0015:
Seven Stars Restaurant
More Flavor Than You Can Wish For
